title: Get Activity TCX
description: The Training Center XML (TCX) is a data exchange format that contains GPS, heart rate, and lap data. This endpoint retrieves the details of a user's location using GPS and heart rate data during a logged exercise.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: includePartialTCX
parameters.description: Includes the TCX points when the GPS data is not available.

response_fields.name: Activity : Id
response_fields.description: The identifier or timestamp of the associated exercise.

response_fields.name: Lap : StartTime
response_fields.description: Timestamp representing each lap's start time.

response_fields.name: Lap : TotalTimeSeconds
response_fields.description: Length of the exercise lap in seconds.

response_fields.name: Lap : DistanceMeters
response_fields.description: Number of meters traveled during the exercise lap. See Distance

response_fields.name: Lap : Calories
response_fields.description: Number of calories burned during the exercise lap.

response_fields.name: Lap : Intensity
response_fields.description: Specifies when the user is in an "active" or "resting" state during an interval activity. Currently, "active" is returned for all activities, and "resting" is not supported. Supported : Active

response_fields.name: Lap : TriggerMethod
response_fields.description: Value associated with the recorded exercise's logType.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : Time
response_fields.description: The time metrics were recorded during the exercise.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : Position : LatitudeDegrees
response_fields.description: The GPS latitude recorded at the specified time.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : pPosition : LongitudeDegrees
response_fields.description: The GPS longitude recorded at the specified time.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : AltitudeMeters
response_fields.description: The altitude in meters recorded at the specified time.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : DistanceMeters
response_fields.description: The distance in meters recorded at the specified time.

response_fields.name: Track : Trackpoint : HeartRateBpm : Value
response_fields.description: The heart rate recorded at the specified time. Heart Rate scope is required to see this value.
